locations.name: 约翰·古尔德
locations.summary: 约翰·古尔德 FRS（英語：John Gould，1804年9月14日—1881年2月3日）是19世纪一位英国鸟类学家。1804年生于英格兰，也是一位商人、艺术家。1838年后与其妻一同前往澳大利亚，在当地发现并為许多新物种命名。 早年…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 新南威爾士州
locations.summary: 新南威爾斯州（英語：New South Wales，缩写为NSW），或譯紐修威省，简称新州、紐省，是澳洲人口最多的一州；位於澳洲的東南部，昆士兰州以南、维多利亞州以北，南澳州以東，首府在悉尼，境內包圍整個澳洲首都領地。新南威爾斯今劃分為1…

locations.name: 南澳大利亚州
locations.summary: 南澳大利亚州（英語：South Australia，缩写为SA），簡稱南澳或南澳州，位於澳大利亚中南部，与澳大利亚大陆的其餘四州及北領地接壤，是澳洲聯邦的一州，是唯一与澳洲大陸上所有聯邦州都接壤的一州，其下劃分為69個地方政府區域。 南澳…

locations.name: 北領地
locations.summary: 北領地（英語：Northern Territory，縮寫為NT），別稱北方领地地区、北部地方、北澳，是澳大利亞的一個聯邦領地，位於澳洲大陸的中北部，北臨帝汶海、阿拉弗拉海與卡奔塔利亞灣，西接西澳州，南鄰南澳州，東界昆士蘭州。其總面積廣達1…

relations.subject: Cinnamon quail-thrush
relations.evidence: The cinnamon quail-thrush (Cinclosoma cinnamomeum) is a small to medium-sized species of bird that is endemic to Australia. This bird is found in the arid and semi-arid regions of central Australia

relations.subject: Cinnamon quail-thrush
relations.evidence: The cinnamon quail-thrush (Cinclosoma cinnamomeum) is a small to medium-sized species of bird that is endemic to Australia. This bird is found in the arid and semi-arid regions of central Australia

relations.subject: Cinnamon quail-thrush
relations.evidence: The cinnamon quail-thrush is an Australian endemic that is typically found in arid and semi-arid regions of central Australia. These regions are defined by the presence of desert vegetation and land forms as well as by low rainfall, with less than per annum in most areas. Its distribution size is estimated to be , spanning over southwest Queensland, northwest New South Wales, northeastern South Australia and the southeast of the Northern Territory. Within these areas the cinnamon quail-thrush has been found in grass and shrublands; however, it is more commonly found among dry stony areas, especially around dry creek lines

relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Cinnamon quail-thrush
relations.evidence: While the cinnamon quail-thrush's population has not been measured, it is thought that the species is slowly declining due to ongoing habitat degradation caused by livestock and introduced herbivores
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
